title: (Bullish Signal) ALRM, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram turned positive on $May 26, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling ALRM's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. A.I. dvisor identified 45 similar cases where ALRM's MACD histogram became positive, and 36 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $81.18 crossed the support line at $84.62 and is trading between $84.62 support and $65.43 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/26/21 - 05/26/21, the price experienced a -14% Downtrend, while the week of 05/19/21 - 05/26/21 shows a +4% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/l2dfjk3mbp171.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=2d3ebaa8c580e2578bd7d59d52c5ac380f39cd19

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where ALRM's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 14 of 20 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 45 of 52 cases where ALRM's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ALRM just turned positive on May 26, 2021. Looking at past instances where ALRM's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 36 of 45 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +1.30% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ALRM advanced for three days, in 311 of 396 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.
